SELECT "p"."Id", "p"."Color", "p"."CreatedAt", "p"."Description", "p"."IsStarred", "p"."IsSynced", "p"."Name", "p"."OwnerId", "p"."SyncId", "p"."UpdatedAt", "a"."Id", "a"."AvatarUrl", "a"."Company", "a"."Country", "a"."CreatedAt", "a"."Email", "a"."FirstName", "a"."FullName", "a"."LastLoginAt", "a"."LastName", "a"."PasswordHash", "a"."Phone", "a"."ResetToken", "a"."ResetTokenExpiry", "a"."Timezone", "s"."ProjectId", "s"."UserId", "s"."Role", "s"."Id", "s"."AvatarUrl", "s"."Company", "s"."Country", "s"."CreatedAt", "s"."Email", "s"."FirstName", "s"."FullName", "s"."LastLoginAt", "s"."LastName", "s"."PasswordHash", "s"."Phone", "s"."ResetToken", "s"."ResetTokenExpiry", "s"."Timezone"
FROM "Projects" AS "p"
INNER JOIN "AppUsers" AS "a" ON "p"."OwnerId" = "a"."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT "p1"."ProjectId", "p1"."UserId", "p1"."Role", "a0"."Id", "a0"."AvatarUrl", "a0"."Company", "a0"."Country", "a0"."CreatedAt", "a0"."Email", "a0"."FirstName", "a0"."FullName", "a0"."LastLoginAt", "a0"."LastName", "a0"."PasswordHash", "a0"."Phone", "a0"."ResetToken", "a0"."ResetTokenExpiry", "a0"."Timezone"
    FROM "ProjectMembers" AS "p1"
    INNER JOIN "AppUsers" AS "a0" ON "p1"."UserId" = "a0"."Id"
) AS "s" ON "p"."Id" = "s"."ProjectId"
WHERE "p"."OwnerId" = @userId OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "ProjectMembers" AS "p0"
    WHERE "p"."Id" = "p0"."ProjectId" AND "p0"."UserId" = @userId)

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT "p1"."ProjectId", "p1"."UserId", "p1"."Role", "a0"."Id", "a0"."AvatarUrl", "a0"."Company", "a0"."Country", "a0"."CreatedAt", "a0"."Email", "a0"."FirstName", "a0"."FullName", "a0"."LastLoginAt", "a0"."LastName", "a0"."PasswordHash", "a0"."Phone", "a0"."ResetToken", "a0"."ResetTokenExpiry", "a0"."Timezone"
    FROM "ProjectMembers" AS "p1"
    INNER JOIN "AppUsers" AS "a0" ON "p1"."UserId" = "a0"."Id"
) AS "s" ON "p"."Id" = "s"."ProjectId"
WHERE "p"."OwnerId" = @userId OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "ProjectMembers" AS "p0"
    WHERE "p"."Id" = "p0"."ProjectId" AND "p0"."UserId" = @userId)
ORDER BY "p"."CreatedAt" DESC, "p"."Id", "a"."Id", "s"."ProjectId", "s"."UserId"

2026-04-25 21:50:53.435 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (0ms) [Parameters=[@userId='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT "a"."Id", "a"."AvatarUrl", "a"."Company", "a"."Country", "a"."CreatedAt", "a"."Email", "a"."FirstName", "a"."FullName", "a"."LastLoginAt", "a"."LastName", "a"."PasswordHash", "a"."Phone", "a"."ResetToken", "a"."ResetTokenExpiry", "a"."Timezone"
FROM "AppUsers" AS "a"
WHERE "a"."Id" IN (
    SELECT "m"."ReceiverId"
    FROM "Messages" AS "m"
    WHERE "m"."SenderId" = @userId AND NOT ("m"."IsDeletedBySender")
    UNION
